items.title_zh: 具身龙虾，上车理想
items.summary_zh: 量子位：具身智能创业公司与理想汽车展开合作，将机器人技术与智能汽车场景深度结合。报道介绍了该具身 AI 初创团队的技术路线及与理想汽车的战略合作背景。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work
items.title_zh: 我构建了一个微型 LLM，揭秘语言模型的工作原理
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer shared GuppyLM, a minimal educational LLM implementation designed to help beginners understand the internals of large language models, including tokenization, attention mechanisms, and training loops. Published on GitHub.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一名开发者分享了 GuppyLM，面向初学者的极简 LLM 实现项目，通过可读代码帮助理解分词、注意力机制和训练过程等语言模型核心概念。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gemma Gem – AI model embedded in a browser – no API keys, no cloud
items.title_zh: Gemma Gem：无需 API key 的浏览器端 Gemma 模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer released Gemma Gem, an open-source project that embeds Google's Gemma model directly in the browser using WebAssembly or WebGPU. It runs entirely client-side with no cloud API keys or server required.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开发者发布 Gemma Gem，利用 WebAssembly 或 WebGPU 将 Gemma 模型嵌入浏览器端本地运行，无需 API key 或云端服务。

items.title_en: Does coding with LLMs mean more microservices?
items.title_zh: LLM 辅助编程会催生更多微服务架构吗？
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An essay exploring whether LLM-assisted coding is driving increased microservices adoption. The author argues that LLMs produce cleaner outputs when given small, isolated contexts, which may push developers toward microservice-style architectures.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一篇探讨 LLM 辅助编程是否推动微服务增长的文章。作者认为 LLM 在小而独立的上下文中表现更好，这可能无意中引导开发者倾向微服务架构。

items.title_en: Qwen-3.6-Plus is the first model to break 1T tokens processed in a day
items.title_zh: 千问3.6Plus日处理量破万亿token
items.summary_en: Alibaba: Qwen-3.6-Plus has become the first AI model to surpass 1 trillion tokens processed in a single day, according to OpenRouter data. The milestone reflects strong adoption and infrastructure scaling for Alibaba's Qwen series.
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴：据OpenRouter数据，阿里千问3.6Plus成为全球首个单日处理量突破1万亿token的AI模型，登顶全球模型调用量榜首，标志着千问系列在规模化部署与用户采用方面取得重大进展。

items.title_en: Musician says AI company is cloning her music, filing claims against her
items.title_zh: 音乐人指控AI公司克隆其音乐并反向投诉
items.summary_en: A musician publicly accused an AI company of cloning her music and filing copyright claims against her when she attempted to take action. The case highlights an emerging pattern where AI-generated imitations are uploaded to streaming platforms, then weaponized against the original creators through automated copyright systems.
items.summary_zh: 一位音乐人公开指控一家AI公司克隆其音乐，并在其尝试维权后遭反向版权投诉。该案揭示了AI生成仿制品被上传至流媒体平台、进而通过自动化版权系统打压原创艺术家的新型侵权模式。

items.title_en: AI Cuts MRI Scan Time from 23 to 9 Minutes at Amsterdam Cancer Center
items.title_zh: AI将阿姆斯特丹癌症中心MRI扫描时间缩至9分钟
items.summary_en: Antoni van Leeuwenhoek Hospital: AI software at the Antoni van Leeuwenhoek Hospital in Amsterdam has reduced MRI scan times from 23 minutes to 9 minutes. The software accelerates conversion of scan data into images using smart calculation. Shorter sessions improve image quality as patients can more easily remain still. The change has increased hospital capacity and reduced pressure on patients and medical staff.
items.summary_zh: 阿姆斯特丹安东尼·范·列文虎克医院：引入AI软件后，MRI扫描时间从23分钟缩短至9分钟。该软件通过智能计算加速扫描数据转图像，扫描时间缩短后患者更易保持静止，图像质量随之提升，医院容量得到提升，患者与医务人员压力均有所降低。

items.title_en: Copilot is 'for entertainment purposes only,' according to Microsoft's terms of use
items.title_zh: 微软Copilot条款标注「仅供娱乐」
items.summary_en: Microsoft: Microsoft's Copilot terms of use, last updated October 24, 2025, state the product is "for entertainment purposes only" and should not be relied on for important advice. A spokesperson said the language is outdated and will be updated to reflect how Copilot is used today. The disclosure surfaces amid broader industry scrutiny of how AI companies characterize model reliability in legal documents.
items.summary_zh: 微软：Copilot服务条款（最后更新于2025年10月24日）标注该产品「仅供娱乐目的」，警告用户不应依赖其进行重要决策。微软发言人承认该措辞已过时，将予以更新。此事引发外界对AI公司如何在法律文件中描述模型可靠性的广泛关注。

items.title_en: Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code
items.title_zh: 用LM Studio无头CLI与Claude Code本地运行Gemma 4
items.summary_en: [title-only] Google: A guide demonstrating how to run Google's Gemma 4 model locally using LM Studio's new headless CLI in combination with Claude Code, enabling local AI inference workflows without a graphical interface.
items.summary_zh: Google：本文介绍如何利用LM Studio新推出的无头CLI工具结合Claude Code，在本地运行Google Gemma 4模型，实现无需图形界面的本地AI推理工作流。

items.title_en: Suno is a music copyright nightmare
items.title_zh: Suno版权问题调查：AI仿冒乐曲泛滥
items.summary_en: Suno: An investigation found Suno's copyright filters are easily bypassed, enabling users to generate AI imitations of songs including works by Beyonce, Black Sabbath, and Aqua using free software. AI detectors flagged the outputs as likely AI-generated. Suno's policy prohibits copyrighted material, but enforcement appears ineffective, raising concerns about streaming platforms being flooded with AI cover slop.
items.summary_zh: Suno：调查发现Suno平台版权过滤器极易绕过，用户可利用免费软件生成碧昂斯、黑色安息日等歌手作品的AI仿冒版本，AI检测工具均将其标记为疑似AI生成。Suno声称禁止使用受版权保护素材，但实际执行效果存疑，外界担忧流媒体平台将被AI仿冒音乐大量侵占。

items.title_en: I let Gemini in Google Maps plan my day and it went surprisingly well
items.title_zh: Gemini 接管 Google Maps 行程规划：出人意料地好用
items.summary_en: The Verge: Google's Gemini AI, integrated into Google Maps, was tested for full-day itinerary planning. The hands-on found it capable of building coherent travel plans with restaurant picks, transit suggestions, and timing — outperforming earlier AI map assistants in practical usability.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：测试者将 Google Maps 中的 Gemini AI 用于全天行程规划，发现其能自动整合餐厅推荐、交通建议和时间安排，实用性超出预期，表现优于以往的 AI 地图助手。

items.title_en: Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI
items.title_zh: 渴望了八年，借助 AI 三个月造出来了
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer who spent eight years wishing for better SQLite developer tooling used AI to build SyntaQLite in just three months. The post explores how AI coding assistants dramatically compressed the time from idea to shipping product for solo developers.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一位开发者等待了八年，希望有更好的 SQLite 开发工具，最终借助 AI 在三个月内完成了 SyntaQLite。文章探讨了 AI 编码助手如何大幅压缩独立开发者从想法到上线的时间。

items.title_zh: Grammarly 的 AI 审稿困境
items.summary_en: The Verge: An expert reviewer recounts a lengthy saga with Grammarly, whose AI suggestions increasingly homogenized their writing style — raising questions about how AI grammar and writing tools reshape individual voice and the broader implications for authentic expression.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：一位专业审稿人讲述了与 Grammarly 的漫长纠葛——AI 建议不断同质化其写作风格，引发了对 AI 写作工具如何重塑个人表达以及真实性的深层思考。

items.title_en: In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants
items.title_zh: 日本机器人不抢工作，专填无人愿做的岗位
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Driven by severe labor shortages, Japan is moving physical AI and robotics from pilot projects into real-world deployment at scale — focusing on physically demanding or undesirable jobs in logistics, agriculture, and care sectors rather than displacing white-collar workers.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：面对严峻的劳动力短缺，日本正将物理 AI 与机器人技术从试点推向大规模落地，重点填补物流、农业和护理等行业中无人愿做的体力岗位，而非取代脑力工作者。

items.title_zh: 太初元碁向员工发放百亿算力token并将共建高校AI科教融合学院
items.summary_zh: 太初元碁：在公司成立五周年大会上，太初元碁宣布向20名员工发放总价值约100万元的百亿算力token（均来自国产智算中心），鼓励员工开展AI Agent创新。同时，太初元碁与浙江工商大学、国家超级计算无锡中心、浙江力积存储科技共建人工智能科教融合学院，为该学院提供智能算力底座，推动「产-学-研」深度融合的AI人才培养。

items.title_zh: OpenAI新模型不是GPTX！全新预训练「土豆」曝光，Sora成弃子的原因找到了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：据报道，OpenAI 正在训练一款代号为「土豆」的全新预训练基础模型，定位并非 GPT-X 系列延续，同时有消息称 Sora 团队遭遇内部资源重组，可能是其发展滞后的主因。

items.title_zh: 太初元碁向员工发放百亿算力token并将共建高校AI科教融合学院
items.summary_zh: 量子位：国内 AI 公司太初元碁宣布向全体员工发放价值百亿的算力 token，并计划与高校共建 AI 科教融合学院，推动产学研深度合作，加速 AI 人才培养与应用落地。

items.title_en: I used AI. It worked. I hated it
items.title_zh: 我用了 AI，它好用，但我很痛苦
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer used Claude Code to build a tool they needed and found it technically effective — but the experience felt deeply unsatisfying. The post reflects on what it means to outsource creative problem-solving to AI and the emotional cost of getting results without the journey.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一位开发者用 Claude Code 构建了所需工具，技术上相当成功，但过程中却感到极度不适。文章反思了将创造性问题解决外包给 AI 的意义，以及在没有亲历过程的情况下获得结果所带来的情感代价。

items.title_zh: 具身龙虾，上车理想
items.summary_zh: 量子位：理想汽车与具身智能初创合作，将 AI 机器人（昵称「龙虾」）部署至门店场景，实现主动迎宾、取车引导等交互功能，探索具身 AI 在汽车零售与服务场景的落地路径。

items.title_zh: OpenAI新模型不是GPTX！全新预训练「土豆」曝光，Sora成弃子的原因找到了
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：据爆料，OpenAI内部代号「土豆（Spud）」的最新预训练模型即为GPT-6，计划于4月14日发布。知情人士称该模型性能较GPT-5.4提升40%，具备原生多模态架构，支持文本、音频、图像、视频，上下文窗口达2M。OpenAI内部将GPT-6定位为「通向AGI的最后一公里」，并计划将ChatGPT、Codex与Atlas浏览器融合为统一智能体应用。Sora资源被削减以集中支持GPT-6研发。
